{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603221110082927E761295FFCF0D7CF"}"},"total":3751},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7479106889982673688","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"很新异，剧情发展明确 是很多小说比不了的，太多这类似题材的小说到100章就很成口水日常文，这是我目前看过的最好的末世废土题材小说"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1741371172,"group_id":"7407035629667634201","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2Nw3aGgGHJBmv93eDJL21llq1Ahdo5azn/EZxnVa33/bu","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/3abe6a50e39b4bf1ba7c29f33074e1a8~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"2568877619025368","user_name":"喜欢若绿的凌霄殿"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2568877619025368","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7407035629667634201","book_info":{"abstract":"天灾降临，怪物横行，这个世界陷入了饥荒和灾难之中。
人类为它们制定等级，用鲜活的生命获取杀人规则。
而它们吐着猩红的舌头，眼中冒着红光，只想吃掉所有的人类。
外面很危险，我只想躲在安全屋里。
林驭要为自己打造一个绝对安全的领域。
